{{Quote|High speed death on four legs.|Description of the altagak by Altoran natives|<ref name="Creatures of the Galaxy">''[[Creatures of the Galaxy]]''</ref>}}
The '''altagak''' was a [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] creature from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Altora]]. Known for its cunning, stealth, and speed, the altagak was thought to be the apex predator of its [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]].

==Biology and appearance==
The altagak of [[Altora]] was a four-legged [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] predator with [[Limb/Legends|foot]] claws and a spiny tail. Two long [[Tooth/Legends|tusks]] protruded on either side of the creature's sinuous snout, which retracted during feeding to display several sets of rending teeth. They also had a [[Bone/Legends|spinal]] [[Hair/Legends|mane]] which adult altagaks expanded into a threatening display to discourage competitors.<ref name="CotG" />

Solitary hunters, altagaks would stalk their prey for hours on end, hiding patiently in the tall [[Grass/Legends|grasses]] of their native savannas. Once within a hundred [[Meter/Legends|meters]] of their target, altagaks lunged into attack with a sudden burst of speed that were recorded to reach up to eighty [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] [[Kilometer per hour/Legends|per hour]]. Using the impetus of its momentum, the hunter would skewer its prey on its long tusks, delivering a head-butt aimed to shock their quarry to the ground. The altagak would then feed using its rending teeth, and would quickly consume its meal to appease the [[Species/Legends|species]]' voracious appetite. The altagak had an average lifespan in excess of twenty-eight [[Standard year/Legends|standard years]].<ref name="CotG" />

[[File:Strike_Force_Altagak.svg|thumb|right|250px|The insignia of [[Strike Force Altagak]].]]

==History==
The altagak were native to the southern savannas of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Altora]], and enjoyed the warmth of the southern clime while basking in the sun for large portions of the day. They hunted a variety of large herd animals native to the plains, although were also known to attack [[Humanoid/Legends|Humanoids]] if game proved scarce. The Altoran natives came to regard the altagaks as "high speed death on four legs,"<ref name="CotG" /> and the species became known for its ability to stalk silently and attack quickly.<ref name="IE">[[Imperial Entanglements (Star Wars Miniatures Battles)|''Imperial Entanglements'']] (pg.58)</ref> They also attacked rancher herds, and their continued depredations threatened the fragile economy of their world, leading to [[Bounty/Legends|bounties]] being placed on altagak hides. The species spread to other planets, and remained fearsome if less of a threat than on their native land where there were few other predators to challenge it.<ref name="CotG" />

The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] unit [[Strike Force Altagak]], stationed on the jungle planet of [[Mentanar Vosk]], was named after the altagak, and used a representation of the predator as its insignia.<ref name="IE" />
